title: agent-2fa — Receipt Claims
description: Schema for the agent-2fa-specific 'claims' object embedded inside a Hub Receipt v0.1 envelope. This schema covers ONLY the claims; the envelope itself (receipt_id, issued_at, issuer_key_id, subject, signature) is defined by hub-receipt/v0.1.

decision.description: Final decision from the Verifier. 'escalate' is not a terminal state and never appears here.

authorizers.description: Per-Authorizer record. Includes deniers and escalators, not only allowers, so the receipt records the full quorum response.

modalities_used.description: Deduplicated union of modality_used across authorizers.

bypass_active.description: True if a signed Bypass entry shortcut Challenge issuance for this Action.

bypass_entry_hash.description: Required when bypass_active is true. Hash of the signed Bypass entry that applied.

action_summary.description: Human-meaningful redacted summary of the Action; sensitive fields per redacted_fields are omitted.

granted_at.description: When the Verifier reached the final decision (last allowing Authorization for allow; quorum-failure or timeout for deny).

expires_at.description: When this authorization stops being valid for reuse (replay defense). Verifiers MUST NOT reuse this decision past expires_at.
